violations.label: Peeling paint (house, garage door, trim, shed)
Unapproved exterior paint color change (including fence)
Broken, rusted, or damaged gate or fence
Unapproved or damaged window coverings (sheets, foil, torn screens)
Roof-mounted equipment (non-approved solar panels)
Unmaintained shutters, awnings, or building elements
Overgrown weeds, noxious grass, or dead plants
violations.note: Only cite if ongoing / over 6 inches

violations.label: Bare dirt or missing granite (must have grass, turf, or granite)
Trash, broken items, or non-harmonious ornaments in yard
Trees not properly pruned (low-hanging or blocking sidewalks)
Shed or patio cover visible above fence line (unapproved)
Oversized or unapproved ramada, gazebo, or play structure
Driveway expansion without ARC approval
Perimeter wall height increase without approval
Poor construction quality or unapproved materials
Parking on unapproved surface (dirt or grass)
Driveway/parking area exceeds 50% of front yard
Vehicle with expired registration or inoperable condition
RV, trailer, boat, or truck over 1 ton visible from street
Using common area or vacant lot for vehicle access/parking
Long-term street parking (non-occasional)
Trash or recycling bins visible on non-collection day
violations.note: Do NOT cite day before/after Monday (black) or Thursday (blue) pickup

violations.label: Trash stored outside of designated covered containers
Unapproved basketball hoop (attached to house, torn, or poor condition)
Holiday decorations not removed within 30 days
Operating a business from home (zoning violation or creates traffic)
Exterior construction without prior ARC approval
Using property in violation of Mesa City Code
Damage to Association common wall or landscaping during construction
Unauthorized modification to common area
